name: factor-mining
description: Claude Code external-agent workflow for Factor Mining plugin.py upload, backtest, polling, and summaries.

interface.shortDescription: Generate, upload, backtest, and summarize Factor Mining plugin.py factors.
interface.longDescription: A Claude Code external-agent helper for writing Factor Mining plugin.py files, validating metadata statically, uploading factors, submitting backtests, polling workflow state, retrieving artifacts, and summarizing results.
defaultPrompt: Set up Factor Mining local-agent access.
Write plugin.py, upload it, and run a backtest.
Resume my Factor Mining run and summarize results.
